query:
SELECT r.*, o.name as org_name, o.slug 
FROM responses r 
LEFT JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT r.*, o.name as org_name, o.slug

LEFT JOIN organizations o ON r.organizationId = o.id 
LIMIT 10;
